text:
また、宇宙からゴミが消えたな。
しかもとびきり大きいヤツが。

この調子で、どんどん駆除を
していこうじゃないか。
あいつらはゴミだからね。

これでハルコタンも
少しは静かになるかね。

……いや、まだまだこれからか。
次の任務も

Another piece of trash has been wiped from
space. And a colossal one at that.

If we keep this pace up, we could exterminate
them all. They're just garbage that needs to be
tossed out, after all.

Now Harukotan will be just a bit
more peaceful.

...No, we're just getting started, really.
I'm relying on you for the next mission, too.
